readiness_rationale: Ready: every step rests on a verified ledger entry. AC-1 rests on the verified argon2 finding (led-0009) and the verified token-design decision (led-0007); the happy-path token round-trip is already green. No step rests on an assumed or absent id, so the readiness gate is satisfied.

grounded: led-0009 (verified, grep src/users): UserService already hashes with argon2 - AC-1 oracle is reachable by wiring the existing hasher.
led-0007 (verified, npm test auth.spec.ts green): short-lived JWT + refresh chosen and a happy-path token round-trips.

candidate_steps.action: Wire the existing argon2 hasher into the user registration path so AC-1 passes.
candidate_steps.expected_effect: AC-1 oracle flips red->green; the happy-path token oracle stays green.
stop_or_remeasure_if: AC-1 oracle stays red after wiring

candidate_steps.action: Confirm the short-lived JWT + refresh token round-trips through the new registration path.

recommended_next_action.action: Wire the existing argon2 hasher into the registration path and re-run the AC-1 oracle.
recommended_next_action.why: Verified-backed change (led-0009) that flips AC-1 green without disturbing any other oracle.
